title: Question: The need for speed
body:
---


Author Name: **Yariv Saliternik**
Original Redmine Message: 78 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hi,

First of all I want to say thanks after using the Verilator in a test case I find it an excelent tool which gives a very unique oppurtunity to front end designer with a knowledge in C++. 

Now for the question!
I have downloaded the benchmark of the verilator (M68 soc) and compared the verilator run to the NC run and I received the following numers:
1. Verilator ~6 sec.
2. NC   0.1 sec.

I checked the Makefile for the options of the NC and the verilator to see that they both run in the same configuration (No debug, No VCD) and also checked the verilog files.

The result I got does not correspond to the result I found on the web. I expected the same speed for the two simulator but got 60 times better on NC.
What could be the reason for that? 
(I'm running on Optron + RedHat + Verilator 3.681) 

Thank you,
Yariv.
